source.body_text_sample:
DONATE
HOME
ABOUT US
OUR PROGRAMS
OTHER SERVICES
GET INVOLVED
SUPPORTERS
Careers

The DDRC hires passionate, driven individuals committed to a team culture of collaboration, trust, and wellness for all. If you want a role where your work truly counts, we may have opportunities that match your skill set and passion. Available positions will be listed below.

The DDRC offers a comprehensive benefits package, competitive pay, and flexible working hours. Our services are community-based and operate in all quadrants of the city so that a client can easily access their home community and workplace.  We also have an active employee social committee that holds fun events throughout the year.

Click here to view our available job opportunities.

Permanent Opportunities
Casual Opportunities
Sub-Contractor Opportunities

The DDRC is an equal opportunity employer. We thank all candidates for their interest.
Only those selected for an interview will be contacted.
We regret that we are unable to accept telephone inquiries.

The DDRC promotes awareness and supports communities to include persons with developmental disabilities, thereby strengthening communities for all citizens.

CONNECT WITH US

Privacy Policy © 2026 DDRC
403-240-3111
